scripts.test:tc: npm run clean:allure && cross-env PW_OPEN_REPORT=true playwright test tests/total-connect --project total-connect
scripts.test:tc:headed: npm run clean:allure && cross-env PW_OPEN_REPORT=true playwright test tests/total-connect --project total-connect --headed
scripts.test:tc:perf: npm run clean:allure && cross-env PW_OPEN_REPORT=true PW_TC_MAX_LOAD_MS=8000 playwright test tests/total-connect --project total-connect
scripts.test:tc:allure: npm run clean:allure && playwright test tests/total-connect --project total-connect && npm run report:allure
scripts.ai:lifecycle:full: node framework/ai/scripts/run-lifecycle.js --phase pre && cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test && node framework/ai/scripts/run-lifecycle.js --phase post
scripts.ai:author: node framework/ai/scripts/nl-test-author.js
scripts.ci:test:heal: cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test tests/generated/ --project chrome --retries 1
scripts.demo:report: npm run clean:allure && npx allure generate -o ./allure-report && npx allure open ./allure-report
scripts.demo:full: npm run demo:explore && npm run demo:test && npm run demo:report
scripts.demo:full:headed: npm run demo:explore && npm run demo:test:headed && npm run demo:report
scripts.demo:heal: cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test tests/generated/ --project chrome --headed
scripts.execute:smoke: npm run clean:allure & npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome & npm run report:allure
scripts.execute:smoke:heal: npm run clean:allure & cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome & npm run report:allure
scripts.demo:phase1: npm run clean:allure && cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true AI_HEALING_LOCATOR=false npx playwright test tests/generated/ --project chrome --headed && npm run report:allure
scripts.demo:phase2: npm run clean:allure && cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true AI_HEALING_LOCATOR=true npx playwright test tests/generated/ --project chrome --headed && npm run report:allure
